home.title: Welcome to Canada
home.subtitle: Your reassuring guide to a smooth start
home.presentation: Marhaban Canada supports you step by step for a stress-free settlement, no account needed.
home.whyContent: A site designed for newcomers: simple, reliable, and accessible everywhere.
home.disclaimer: This site does not collect any personal data. Your progress stays on your device.

checklist.title: Settlement Checklist
checklist.description: Check each step to track your progress. Your progress is saved locally.
